tools.description: Public holidays for any country and year, plus optional business-day checking. findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: email-validate, web-search, job-search · Private data: email-validate, pdf-extract, web-search · Public sink: email-validate, news-search · Destructive: part-lookup.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: email-validate, web-search, job-search · Private data: email-validate, pdf-extract, web-search · Public sink: email-validate, news-search · Destructive: part-lookup

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
